title: Ore Plus Ultra
description: This datapack increasing the spawn rates of vanilla minerals to the maximum limit of game
body:
🌐 English  |  中文
> **✅ Separating From [[📁 Ore Plus (Legacy)]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ore_plus)** > > For organizing versions\ > x2 x4 and Ultra edition, including datapack and mod version makes even more difficult to find suitable in original project.



![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.16.2--1.16.5_|_1.17.x_|_1.18.x_|_1.19.x_|_1.20.x_|_1.21.x_|_26.1.x-passing?style=flat&label=Minecraft&labelColor=E1FFFE&color=E1FFFE&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fdatapack%2Fore_plus%2Fversions&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/BY80DwpU?label=Latest%20Version&labelColor=E1FFFE&color=E1FFFE&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fdatapack%2Fore_plus%2Fversions&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,) ![GitHub Release Date](https://img.shields.io/github/release-date/wen-wen520/Minecraft.Datapack-Ore_Plus?label=Latest%20Release%20Date&labelColor=E1FFFE&color=E1FFFE&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fdatapack%2Fore_plus%2Fversions&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

## 📋 Overview This datapack modifies the default ore generation in Minecraft, primarily increasing the spawn rates of certain minerals. Created with 💗 by wen_wen ## ❇️ Features ### Efficient Resource Gathering Less time with creepers in caves, more time for exciting things ### Native Datapack, Wide Compatibility: Vanilla Single Play, Plungin Multiple Player Server, with or with out any Mod Loader you preferred (Forge NeoForge Fabric Quilt), this datapack works seamlessly with any type of Minecraft. ### Vanilla Feature, Clean Experience This datapack will only affect ores in new generated chunks, keep your loaded chunks safe and untouched. ## 🖼️ Gallery [Modrinth Gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ore_plus_ultra/gallery)\ [Compare With Other Edition](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ore_plus/gallery) ![The deep cave ore generation using Ultra datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EvMSt5OU/images/9fb254d863a6da3aae71865561b513d5f182ef8e.jpeg) ## 📖 Detail ### Rate Table | Ore Name | Gen Rate | Gen Rate Ultra | Discard Chance | Discard Chance Ultra | |----------------------|----------|----------------|----------------|-----------------------| | Ancient Debris Large | 1 | 256 | 1 | 0 | | Coal Lower | 20 | 256 | 0.5 | 0 | | Coal Upper | 30 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Copper | 16 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Copper Large | 16 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Ancient Debris Small | 1 | 256 | 1 | 0 | | Diamond | 7 | 256 | 0.5 | 0 | | Diamond Buried | 4 | 256 | 1 | 0 | | Diamond Large | 1 in 9 | 1 in 1 | 0.7 | 0 | | Diamond Medium | 2 | 256 | 0.5 | 0 | | Emerald | 100 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Gold | 4 | 256 | 0.5 | 0 | | Nether Gold Deltas | 20 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Gold Extra | 50 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Gold Lower | [0,1] | 256 | 0.5 | 0 | | Nether Gold | 10 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Iron Middle | 10 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Iron Small | 10 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Iron Upper | 90 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Lapis | 2 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Lapis Buried | 4 | 256 | 1 | 0 | | Quartz Deltas | 32 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Quartz Nether | 16 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Redstone | 4 | 256 | 0 | 0 | | Redstone Lower | 8 | 256 | 0 | 0 | Gen Rates: Ore generation rates. (higher is more frequent)\ Discard Chance: Discard ore generation if exposed to air. (lower is more frequent) Refer to [wiki](https://github.com/wen-wen520/Minecraft.Datapack-Ore_Plus/wiki) for more details _The names of the packs do not reflect the directly multiplied probabilities from the vanilla rates, but rather the extent to which the datapack modifies the original ore generation probabilities._ ## ✅ Installation ### Download [[⬇️ Modrinth Version List]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ore_plus_ultra/versions) [[📁 Legacy Versions]](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ore_plus) ### Install Strongly recommand to install at the creation of a world [How to Install Datapack](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Installing_a_data_pack) ## ⚙️ Versions ### Supported 1.16.2 -26.1.2 ## 📃 Contact ### Community [Discord Group](https://discord.gg/RR2cRxseKF) [Github Discussion](https://github.com/wen-wen520/Minecraft.Datapack-Ore_Plus/discussions) ### Feedback [📑Issue Page](https://github.com/wen-wen520/Minecraft.Datapack-Ore_Plus/issues/new/choose) for any bugs or featuers. ## 📜 License ## 🎉 Thanks & Related Resource ![Modrinth Follows](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/BY80DwpU?style=flat&label=Follows&labelColor=E1FFFE&color=E1FFFE&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fdatapack%2Fore_plus&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,) ![GitHub Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/wen-wen520/Minecraft.Datapack-Ore_Plus?style=flat&labelColor=E1FFFE&color=E1FFFE&label=Stars) I am really thanks everyone who follow or star this project,\ and of course, those people who download, use and love this project are also appreciate
